logicalScenes.description: A thick orange spicy mayo ribbon lifts from a spoon and drops in a glossy loop.
logicalScenes.note: Texture-first opening; no finished bowl yet.
logicalScenes.textureCue: opaque orange sauce, shiny sesame oil glint

notes: Keep it as sauce preparation, not final plating.

logicalScenes.description: Top-down view of the small sauce bowl on the Licorn island beside warm rice, clarifying sushi-bowl direction.
logicalScenes.note: Scene 2 pays off scene 1 by anchoring the sauce as a bowl topping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: orange sauce bowl next to steaming rice

logicalScenes.description: Whisk completes the spicy mayo, erasing red sriracha streaks into a uniform orange gloss.
logicalScenes.note: One simple circular mixing motion.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thick emulsion, smooth surface

logicalScenes.description: The spoon lifts a clean ribbon from the sauce, holding a final glossy peak.
logicalScenes.note: Reusable texture payoff before hard cut to tofu prep.
logicalScenes.textureCue: ribbon trail and soft peak

logicalScenes.description: Pressed tofu block appears on a cutting board, towel pulled aside, character hands visible.
logicalScenes.note: Compress the press step; no long wait depicted.
logicalScenes.textureCue: matte compressed tofu surface

notes: Avoid cloth-in-hand hot transfer; this is cold tofu prep.

logicalScenes.description: Tofu is cut into even 1-inch, 2.5 cm cubes, not giant blocks or tiny dice.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock begins here and continues through bowl assembly.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clean pale cube edges

notes: Use a real knife/cutting-board description, not a near-miss utensil reference.

logicalScenes.description: Tamari-sriracha glaze splashes over tofu cubes in a bowl.
logicalScenes.note: One pour; no complicated multi-bottle choreography.
logicalScenes.textureCue: brown-red glossy streaks on pale tofu

logicalScenes.description: Spatula tosses cubes until the coating turns uniformly glossy.
logicalScenes.note: Optional cornstarch is treated as absorbed, not visible raw powder.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin glaze clinging to cube corners

logicalScenes.description: Hard cut to baked tofu cubes with browned crisp edges sliding from tray.
logicalScenes.note: Transformation payoff; use state reference for browned 1-inch cube scale.
logicalScenes.textureCue: golden-brown corners, chewy center, light oil sheen

notes: Use hard cut instead of asking Seedance to bake in real time.

logicalScenes.description: Warm cooked rice sits in a wide bowl on the island; steam makes the base readable.
logicalScenes.note: Rice is not cooked on camera; this starts with cooked warm rice.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white or brown sticky grains, visible steam

logicalScenes.description: Rice vinegar pours in a clear thin stream over the warm rice.
logicalScenes.note: Use one clear pour rather than showing every seasoning separately.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet sheen spreading between grains

logicalScenes.description: Spoon folds rice until the grains turn glossy and gently clump.
logicalScenes.note: Texture payoff every 3 to 5 scenes.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sticky glossy grains, no dry chalky patches

logicalScenes.description: A rice mound drops into a 16 to 18 cm serving bowl, filling the bottom third.
logicalScenes.note: Serving bowl scale lock for later assembly.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft sticky mound settling

notes: Not a full plate; preserve bowl shape.

logicalScenes.description: Cutting board with avocado, mango, cucumber, and scallions arranged for quick prep.
logicalScenes.note: Brief context shot, not neutral ingredient lineup for the opening.
logicalScenes.textureCue: green, orange, pale green color blocks

logicalScenes.description: Avocado half fans into clean green slices, about half an avocado per bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Keep avocado creamy and fresh, not browned.
logicalScenes.textureCue: smooth creamy slices, pale center

logicalScenes.description: Mango is diced into juicy 1.5 cm orange cubes.
logicalScenes.note: Orange juiciness differentiates mango from tofu.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet glossy mango faces

notes: Not tofu cubes; specify juicy fruit.

logicalScenes.description: Persian cucumber slices fall into neat thin coins, about half a cucumber per bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Crisp watery snap contrast.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pale green wet centers, darker peel rims

logicalScenes.description: Scallions slice into tiny rings and slide into a small controlled pile.
logicalScenes.note: Keep garnish quantity small but visible.
logicalScenes.textureCue: fresh green rings

notes: Avoid garnish confetti filling the whole frame.

logicalScenes.description: Small saucepan and jar establish quick pickled radish prep on the island.
logicalScenes.note: Optional radishes are included as a planned visual accent.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clear brine, red-white radish rounds

logicalScenes.description: Warm clear brine pours over thin radish slices in a jar.
logicalScenes.note: No boiling drama; clear brine pour is enough.
logicalScenes.textureCue: transparent liquid, floating paper-thin discs

logicalScenes.description: Hard cut to bright pink pickled radish slices lifted from brine.
logicalScenes.note: State-reference transformation from raw red-white to pink.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet bright pink crisp discs

notes: Use hard cut; do not morph color slowly.

logicalScenes.description: Nori sheet or seaweed snack crumbles into thin black strips, 2 to 4 mm wide.
logicalScenes.note: Lock thin strips; no whole sushi wrappers in final bowl.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry crackly black strips

notes: Nori must not become a sushi roll wrapper.

logicalScenes.description: One 16 to 18 cm bowl with rice base sits centered on the Licorn kitchen island.
logicalScenes.note: Assembly begins with one serving, not all four bowls.
logicalScenes.textureCue: rice base fills bottom third

notes: Serving bowl, not plate or sushi roll tray.

logicalScenes.description: Eight to ten browned tofu cubes tumble onto one side of the rice.
logicalScenes.note: Carry 1-inch cube scale from baked tofu segment.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp brown edges against white rice

logicalScenes.description: Avocado fan slides onto the rice beside tofu, about half an avocado.
logicalScenes.note: Green creamy block balances tofu.
logicalScenes.textureCue: smooth green fan

logicalScenes.description: Mango cubes and cucumber coins fill two separate bright sections.
logicalScenes.note: Separate toppings into readable color blocks.
logicalScenes.textureCue: juicy orange cubes beside crisp pale green discs

notes: If motion is too complex, split mango and cucumber into hard cuts.

logicalScenes.description: Pickled ginger curls and six to eight pink radish slices are placed as controlled accents.
logicalScenes.note: Plating quantity lock prevents garnish drift.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet pink radish, pale ginger curls

notes: Not full bowl coverage; accents only.

logicalScenes.description: Spicy mayo zigzags over the assembled bowl, about 1 to 2 tablespoons.
logicalScenes.note: Return to the opening texture and pay it off on the bowl.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thick orange glossy lines over tofu and rice

logicalScenes.description: Black nori strips fall lightly over the sauce and rice.
logicalScenes.note: 2 to 4 mm strips only.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry crackly black ribbons

logicalScenes.description: Sesame seeds rain over the bowl and catch on the spicy mayo lines.
logicalScenes.note: Use a small pinch, not a pile.
logicalScenes.textureCue: tiny white and tan seeds on glossy sauce

logicalScenes.description: A small microgreens tuft lands near the rim without hiding the toppings.
logicalScenes.note: Plating side quantity: one small tuft only.
logicalScenes.textureCue: fresh tiny green leaves

logicalScenes.description: Finished bowl sits on the Licorn island with all topping sections readable.
logicalScenes.note: Final context in kitchen, not a restaurant table redesign.
logicalScenes.textureCue: organized color blocks in one bowl

notes: Preserve terrazzo counter and kitchen identity.

logicalScenes.description: Spoon enters and gathers sticky rice, a browned tofu cube, avocado, mango, cucumber, nori, and sauce.
logicalScenes.note: Perfect bite composition.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sticky rice cling, crisp tofu edge, creamy avocado, glossy sauce

notes: No chopsticks required; spoon is simpler and asset-backed.

logicalScenes.description: The spoon lift shows the bite close to camera, with sauce stretching slightly across rice grains.
logicalScenes.note: Hero bite payoff; no mouth close-up needed.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sticky grains, orange gloss, crisp nori edge

logicalScenes.description: Macro texture tour across tofu, avocado, mango, cucumber, pink radish, sesame, and nori.
logicalScenes.note: Final material contrast before character reaction.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp, creamy, juicy, chewy, crackly contrasts

notes: Short controlled pan only; no extra shots.

logicalScenes.description: Licorn character is visible behind the finished bowl, satisfied and proud in the same kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: End with finished dish in Licorn kitchen context and character satisfaction.
logicalScenes.textureCue: hero bowl foreground, character smile background

notes: No speech, no voiceover, no text.
